---
title: "‘Leaves of promise.’ Signed C.M. Yonge."
---

## ‘Leaves of promise.’ Signed C.M. Yonge.

**By Charlotte Mary Yonge**

**Published:** 1901
**Genre:** Non-fiction
**Format:** Article in Journal

**Publisher:** <i>Friendly Leaves</i> (February 1901) 83-4.

### Notes

In series \'Leaves for the Months\', several which are unsigned, but which are attributed to CMY in her obituary in <i>Friendly Leaves</i>.

---

[← Back to all letters](../../letters.html)
